title: Asymptotic Analysis Q1 - Triangular Sum with Halving Helper
general_notes: No double deduction (except in points 10 and 11). Do not deduct again for an error already penalised in an earlier point.
Students can use Theta or big-O notation with tight bounds.
Both combined-analysis and separate-analysis approaches for nested loops are acceptable.
The intended answers are T_f(N) = Theta(N^2) and T_g(N) = Theta(log N).

rubric_points.name: Splitting code into parts + referencing line numbers
rubric_points.target: Clear separation of f and g; loops vs non-loop code identified; line numbers referenced consistently.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Analysis does not clearly separate f vs g, or loops vs non-loops, and line numbers are unclear or missing.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some attempt to separate components or refer to line numbers, but structure is incomplete or ambiguous.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Clear separation of f and g; loop and non-loop regions and the call to g identified; line numbers referenced consistently.

rubric_points.name: Constant-time non-loop parts
rubric_points.target: All non-loop code in f and g is Theta(1); may be grouped.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Non-loop code not analysed or incorrectly claimed to be non-constant.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some constant-time segments identified but others missing or vaguely stated.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: All non-loop regions (initialisations and returns in f and g) stated as Theta(1).

rubric_points.name: f(): Nested loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(N^2) combined iterations of the nested for loops.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(N^2) (e.g. claims Theta(N) or Theta(N log N)).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N^2) but with weak or incomplete justification (e.g. 'double loop ⇒ N^2' without referencing the j <= i bound).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Clearly argues Theta(N^2), either by summing 1 + 2 + ... + N = N(N+1)/2 (combined) or by stating outer Theta(N) and inner average Theta(N) (separate).

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Claims non-constant per-iteration cost, or does not clearly state cost per iteration.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Suggests constant time but with incomplete reasoning (missing explanation of array accesses and arithmetic).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: States Theta(1), justified by the constant number of array reads, arithmetic operations, and the += assignment; loop checks and increments are Theta(1).

rubric_points.name: f(): Total loop cost = iterations x per-iteration
rubric_points.target: Theta(N^2) from Theta(N^2) iterations x Theta(1) per iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: No multiplication of iteration count x per-iteration cost, or total complexity that does not match own previous analysis.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Multiplies own values but final simplification or reasoning is unclear or incorrect.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(N^2) x Theta(1) = Theta(N^2), with clear justification.

rubric_points.name: f(): Cost of Part C (call to g + constant work)
rubric_points.target: Theta(log N), accounting for both the cost of the g call and the constant-time return.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Cost of Part C missing or incorrect (e.g. claims Theta(1) or Theta(N)).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Notes that cost comes from g but unclear about Theta(log N).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Accounts for the cost of the g call as Theta(log N) and the addition / return as Theta(1).

rubric_points.name: g(): Loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(log N) iterations because k is halved each iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(log N) (e.g. claims Theta(N)).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(log N) but does not explain the halving (k = k / 2 each iteration).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Justifies Theta(log N) by explaining that k starts at N and is divided by 2 each iteration until it reaches 0.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Claims non-constant per-iteration cost, or does not clearly state cost per iteration.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Suggests operations are small/constant but lacks explicit Theta(1) justification.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Each iteration Theta(1): one array read, one += assignment, one division, loop check.

rubric_points.name: g(): Total loop cost
rubric_points.target: Theta(log N) = Theta(log N) iterations x Theta(1) per iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Does not combine iteration count x per-iteration cost, or resulting complexity is incompatible with own values.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Attempts multiplication using own values but expression or simplification is unclear or incorrect.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(log N) x Theta(1) = Theta(log N), with justification.

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of g
rubric_points.target: T_g(N) = Theta(log N), summing the constant-time parts and the loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Runtime absent or incompatible with earlier analysis.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(log N) but with missing reasoning (not clearly summing the constant-time parts and the loop).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(log N) + Theta(1) = Theta(log N).

buckets.label: Internally consistent but incorrect final result
buckets.description: Final not Theta(log N), but correctly calculated as a sum based on own earlier (possibly wrong) values.

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of f
rubric_points.target: T_f(N) = Theta(N^2), accounting for non-loop parts + nested loop + Part C.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Final complexity missing/incorrect and not derived from loop analysis.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N^2) but with missing reasoning (e.g. not clearly adding all parts of f).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(N^2) + Theta(log N) = Theta(N^2), correctly absorbing the lower-order log N term.

buckets.label: Internally consistent but incorrect final result
buckets.description: Final not Theta(N^2), but correctly calculated as a sum of the cost of each part of f using own earlier values.
